name: Magnolia Berry Christmas Arrangement - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Transform your home or office with the festive charm of the Magnolia Berry Holiday Arrangement from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This artificial potted plant showcases lush green magnolia leaves, pine stems and red berries arranged together and housed inside a textured ceramic pot for quick and easy display. Set it in an empty space next to your entryway console, end table, or in a corner nook to create a charming indoor oasis that requires no watering.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
